title: Successful Credit Card Payment with Valid Details
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the shopping cart. User is on the checkout page with the credit card payment option selected. A valid test credit card (Visa/MasterCard/AMEX) is available with sufficient funds.
steps: Enter valid credit card number, expiration date, and CVV in the respective fields.
Click the 'Pay Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button.
expected_result: The system processes the payment successfully. An order confirmation page is displayed with a unique transaction ID. The user receives an order confirmation email.

title: Payment Fails with Invalid Credit Card Number
preconditions: User is on the checkout page with the credit card payment option selected.
steps: Enter an invalid credit card number (e.g., incorrect length, invalid checksum) into the card number field.
Enter valid expiration date and CVV.
Click the 'Pay Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button.
expected_result: An error message 'Invalid card number' or similar is displayed below the card number field. The payment is not processed, and the user remains on the checkout page.

title: Payment Fails with Expired Credit Card
preconditions: User is on the checkout page with the credit card payment option selected. An expired test credit card is available.
steps: Enter a valid credit card number, an expired expiration date, and a valid CVV.
Click the 'Pay Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button.
expected_result: An error message 'Expired card' or similar is displayed. The payment is rejected, and the user remains on the checkout page.

title: Payment Fails Due to Insufficient Funds
preconditions: User is on the checkout page with the credit card payment option selected. A test credit card with insufficient funds (or configured to simulate this) is available.
steps: Enter valid credit card number, expiration date, and CVV for the card with insufficient funds.
Click the 'Pay Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button.
expected_result: A decline message 'Insufficient funds' or similar is displayed. The payment is rejected, and the user remains on the checkout page.

title: Payment Gateway Timeout Offers Retry Option
preconditions: User is on the checkout page with the credit card payment option selected. The payment gateway is configured to simulate a timeout scenario.
steps: Enter valid credit card details.
Click the 'Pay Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button.
Wait for the simulated timeout.
expected_result: A message indicating a payment processing error or timeout is displayed. A 'Retry Payment' or similar option is presented to the user. The user can attempt the payment again.

title: Payment Fails with Invalid CVV
preconditions: User is on the checkout page with the credit card payment option selected.
steps: Enter a valid credit card number and expiration date.
Enter an invalid CVV (e.g., incorrect length, non-numeric) into the CVV field.
Click the 'Pay Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button.
expected_result: A validation error message 'Invalid CVV' or similar is displayed below the CVV field. The payment is not processed, and the user remains on the checkout page.

title: System Prevents Duplicate Payment Submission
preconditions: User is on the checkout page with the credit card payment option selected. A valid test credit card is available.
steps: Enter valid credit card details.
Rapidly click the 'Pay Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button multiple times (e.g., double-click).
expected_result: Only one payment transaction is processed successfully. The system prevents duplicate charges for the same order. A single order confirmation is displayed.

title: System Handles Network Failure During Payment Transaction
preconditions: User is on the checkout page with the credit card payment option selected. A valid test credit card is available. Network conditions can be simulated to fail during transaction.
steps: Enter valid credit card details.
Click the 'Pay Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button.
Simulate a network disconnection or failure immediately after submission but before response.
expected_result: The system displays an appropriate error message (e.g., 'Network error, please try again'). The payment is not processed or is marked as failed. The user is given an option to retry or check order status.

title: System Handles Partial Payment Success (Auth Success, Capture Failure)
preconditions: User is on the checkout page with the credit card payment option selected. A test credit card is configured to allow authorization but fail capture.
steps: Enter valid credit card details for the configured card.
Click the 'Pay Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button.
expected_result: The system detects the capture failure. The user is informed that the payment could not be completed and is prompted to try again or use an alternative payment method. The authorization is voided or released, and no funds are captured.

title: Payment Session Expiry Prevents Transaction
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the shopping cart. User is on the checkout page. The payment session timeout is configured to a short duration (e.g., 1 minute) for testing.
steps: Navigate to the checkout page and select credit card payment.
Wait for the configured payment session timeout duration without interacting with the payment form.
Enter valid credit card details and click 'Pay Now'.
expected_result: The system displays a 'Session expired' or 'Payment session invalid' message. The payment is not processed. The user is prompted to refresh the page or restart the checkout process.
